name: Peanut Butter Fudge#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate chips and peanut butter in a microwave-safe dish.
2. Microwave on high for 1-2 minutes until the chips have completely melted.
3. Add sweetened condensed milk; stir until the mixture is of a uniform consistency.
4. Pour into an 8" x 8" square pan lined with wax paper.
5. Refrigerate until firm.
6. Cut into 1" pieces.
Yield: 1 1/2 pounds or 16 servings
